goal: Complete the Jobs At Aftershoot application at Careers autonomously until a protected or final review checkpoint.
summary: Final submit requires manual review or external submit is disabled.

subgoals.label: Open job page
subgoals.detail: Job page opened successfully in a visible Chrome session.

subgoals.label: Finish active section
subgoals.detail: Reading Section 1 and planning the next safe action.

subgoals.label: Retry alternative path
subgoals.detail: No visible fields yet, so the planner is opening the application path.

subgoals.label: Reach submit/review gate
subgoals.detail: Reached the final step but could not safely finish the submit action.

subgoals.label: Save checkpoint
subgoals.detail: Saved planner state at the final manual review checkpoint.
